property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: individualAchievementFormConfigurationName
property.label: Individual Achievement Form Configuration Name
property.description: The wizard config record Name. This is used to determine the fields to be rendered in the additional info details.

property.name: agreementCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Agreement Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Agreement.

property.name: departmentCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Department Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Department.

property.name: agreementRecognitionCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Agreement Recognition Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Agreement Recognition.

property.name: verificationDetailsFieldSetName
property.label: Verification Details Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to display in the verification details section.

property.name: agreementCustomFilter
property.label: Agreement Custom Filter
property.default: reduivy__Status__c = 'Active' AND ((reduivy__Start_Date__c <= TODAY AND reduivy__End_Date__c > TODAY) OR (reduivy__Start_Date__c <= TODAY AND reduivy__End_Date__c = null) OR (reduivy__Start_Date__c = null AND reduivy__End_Date__c = null))
property.description: The condition to filter the unrelated Agreement.

property.name: departmentCustomFilter
property.label: Department Custom Filter
property.description: The condition to filter the unrelated Department.

property.name: agreementRecognitionCustomFilter
property.label: Agreement Recognition Custom Filter
property.description: The condition to filter the unrelated Agreement Recognition.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.

property.name: recordId
property.label: Record Id
property.description: ID of the salesforce record for which the record details are to be displayed e.g. {!recordId}

property.name: userMode
property.label: User Mode
property.description: Supported options are: Admin, Student.

property.name: individualAchievementFormConfigurationName
property.label: Individual Achievement Form Configuration Name
property.description: The wizard config record Name. This is used to determine the fields to be rendered in the additional info details.

property.name: agreementCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Agreement Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Agreement.

property.name: departmentCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Department Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Department.

property.name: agreementRecognitionCreationFieldSetName
property.label: Agreement Recognition Creation Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to use when creating a new Agreement Recognition.

property.name: verificationDetailsFieldSetName
property.label: Verification Details Field Set Name
property.description: The field set to display in the verification details section.

property.name: agreementCustomFilter
property.label: Agreement Custom Filter
property.default: reduivy__Status__c = 'Active' AND ((reduivy__Start_Date__c <= TODAY AND reduivy__End_Date__c > TODAY) OR (reduivy__Start_Date__c <= TODAY AND reduivy__End_Date__c = null) OR (reduivy__Start_Date__c = null AND reduivy__End_Date__c = null))
property.description: The condition to filter the unrelated Agreement.

property.name: departmentCustomFilter
property.label: Department Custom Filter
property.description: The condition to filter the unrelated Department.

property.name: agreementRecognitionCustomFilter
property.label: Agreement Recognition Custom Filter
property.description: The condition to filter the unrelated Agreement Recognition.

property.name: enableDebugMode
property.label: Debug Mode
property.description: Enable debug mode.
